name: file-integrity-monitoring-system
description: File Integrity Monitoring System — React frontend + Python API

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:web: wait-on -t 60000 http-get://127.0.0.1:8000/api/status && npm run dev --prefix frontend
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run start:api
